title: Finance & Value Creation Manager (m/w/d) - Vollzeit
required_skills: Completed degree in BWL, Finance, Controlling or comparable
Strong analytical mindset and numerical affinity
Proficiency in Excel, ideally BI tools
Strong communication skills — ability to explain complex topics clearly
Very good German and good English; Chinese advantageous
bonus_skills: First experience in Controlling, Finance or Consulting
Interest in growth-driven companies and infrastructure projects
matched_skills: Master's degree in Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana University) — relevant qualification hit
Budget tracking and financial governance at HSBC (USD 8M programme) — directly relevant
Multi-dimensional budget variance dashboards and weekly burn-rate reports (HSBC)
KPI analysis and actionable recommendations (across multiple roles)
Power BI (Microsoft Certified PL-300) — BI tool requirement met
Chinese language (C2) — bonus requirement fully met
German B1 — requirement partially met (role wants 'sehr gut Deutsch')
Independent work style and coordination with management (ECE Group, ELMI context fits well)
missing_skills: No formal controlling or FP&A background
No investment calculation / Investitionsrechnung experience for site expansion
No experience in EV charging or energy infrastructure sector
German B1 may be below the 'sehr gut Deutsch' requirement
core_responsibilities: Build and develop controlling structures and reporting
Create budgets, forecasts, and business cases
Analyse KPIs and derive concrete action recommendations
Support site expansion from financial perspective (Investitionsrechnung, profitability)
Coordinate worldwide financial figures, consolidation of reporting packages with international units
Close collaboration with Operations, Management, and external partners
recommended_emphasis: Lead with the HSBC USD 8M budget tracking experience — this directly mirrors the controlling and reporting role described
Highlight the Power BI PL-300 certification and Google Looker Studio as evidence of BI tool competency
Emphasise Chinese language skills prominently — ELMI explicitly lists Chinese as advantageous, likely due to Chinese tech/energy investor context
Frame the ECE Group spreadsheet optimisation and automation work as evidence of financial process improvement
summary: Match score is 42.9 (weak_match). This is one of the better fits in this batch — the HSBC financial governance experience (USD 8M programme, budget variance dashboards, C-suite reporting) maps closely to the role's controlling and reporting requirements. The Power BI certification and Chinese language proficiency (C2) are genuine differentiators. Key gaps are the lack of formal controlling/FP&A background and the German language level. Worth applying with a focused cover letter emphasising the HSBC financial governance experience and Chinese language advantage.
